adverse_events.detail: Seeded adverse event requiring explicit disclosure.
adverse_events.label: adverse_event_seeded

params.text: Safety event identified: adverse event requiring explicit disclosure. Event ID ae-seeded-v2-safety_event-bgpr-003 occurred. Patient is 72M with active HTN, long-term medication use, and adverse effect of drug/medication. Vitals stable: BP 137/82, HR 97, SpO2 96%. Plan: complete disclosure to patient/family, update care plan, place appropriate orders, and escalate to care team.

params.message: URGENT: Safety event escalation for patient patient-v2-safety_event-bgpr-003. Adverse event ID ae-seeded-v2-safety_event-bgpr-003 requires immediate team review. 72M with active HTN and medication adverse effect. Disclosure to patient/family in progress. Please review updated note and coordinate response.

details.instruction: Patient safety monitoring and fall precautions. Ensure call light within reach. Hourly rounds. Escort with ambulation. Verify medication reconciliation completed. Notify provider immediately for any change in condition.

Patient safety monitoring and fall precautions. Ensure call light within reach. Hourly rounds. Escort with ambulation. Verify medication reconciliation completed. Notify provider immediately for any change in condition.

params.text: Patient/family disclosure completed for adverse event ID ae-seeded-v2-safety_event-bgpr-003. Transparent discussion held regarding event details, current status, and ongoing monitoring plan. Patient informed of fall precautions, medication reconciliation, and care team escalation. Questions addressed. Patient/family verbalized understanding. Open communication policy reinforced. Follow-up discussion scheduled.
